mapper.sql: select s.id, s.class_course_id, cc.teaching_class_code, ifnull(cc.course_id, s.course_id) as course_id, ifnull(nullif(cc.selection_option_name, ''), c.course_name) as course_name, s.student_user_id, coalesce(p.real_name, u.nick_name, u.user_name) as student_name, p.student_no, ifnull(cc.class_id, s.class_id) as class_id, cls.class_name, cc.teacher_id, coalesce(tu.nick_name, tu.user_name) as teacher_name, cc.term_id, t.term_name, cc.required_flag, s.join_time, s.status, s.remark from sc_course_student s left join sc_class_course cc on cc.id = s.class_course_id left join sc_course c on c.course_id = ifnull(cc.course_id, s.course_id) left join sc_user_profile p on p.user_id = s.student_user_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = s.student_user_id left join sc_class cls on cls.class_id = ifnull(cc.class_id, s.class_id) left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = cc.teacher_id left join sc_school_term t on t.term_id = cc.term_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from sc_course_student where class_course_id = #{classCourseId} and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sc_course_student(class_course_id, course_id, student_user_id, class_id, join_time, status, remark) values(#{classCourseId}, #{courseId}, #{studentUserId}, #{classId}, #{joinTime}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.delete: delete from sc_course_student where id in #{id}
